item.title: Contact us
item.metad: Contact Us: Got questions? We're here to help. Fill out the form and reach out. Your answers are just a message away!
item.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html class="contactus" lang="en">

<head>
    <title> Contact Us </title>
    <meta charset='UTF-8'>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" >
</head>


<body>
    <div class="main">
        <!-- main content -->
        <div class="conctactcontent">
            <h2 id="contactus"> HAVE SOME QUESTIONS? </h2>
            <form id="form" action="https://jkorpela.fi/cgi-bin/echo.cgi" method="post">
                <label for="fname">First name</label><br>
                <input type="text" id="fname" name="fname" required><br>
                <label for="lname">Last name</label><br>
                <input type="text" id="lname" name="lname" required><br>
                <label for="email"> What's your email?</label><br>
                <input type="text" id="email" name="email" required><br>
                <label for="message">What's your message?</label><br>
                <textarea class="textarea" id="message" name="message" rows="10" cols="30" required></textarea><br>
                <p> Is it Urgent?</p>
                <label for="yes">yes</label>
                <input type="radio" id="yes" name="urgent" value="yes" required>
                <label for="no">no</label>
                <input type="radio" id="no" name="urgent" value="no" required><br><br>
                <input type="submit" value="Send message"><br><br>
                <input type="reset" value="Start again">
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>
</body>

</html>
item.author: mac123
